title: Public Opinion on ICE Handling
summary: A majority of Americans disapprove of ICE's handling of their jobs, with 40% strongly disapproving and 51% finding their tactics too forceful.

title: ICE Handling Sparks Violence
summary: Rep. Maxine Dexter and Sen. Eric Schmitt express opposing views on ICE's handling of immigration, with Dexter calling it cruel and Schmitt calling it destructive. The debate comes after a shooting incident involving ICE agents.
